# sailpoint_entitlement (Data Source)

Data source for SailPoint Entitlement. Look up an entitlement by ID to retrieve its attributes.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the entitlement.

### Read-Only

- `attribute` (String)
- `cloud_governed` (Boolean)
- `created` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `manually_updated_fields` (Map of Boolean)
- `modified` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `owner` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--owner))
- `privileged` (Boolean)
- `requestable` (Boolean)
- `segments` (Set of String)
- `source` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--source))
- `source_schema_object_type` (String)
- `value` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--owner"></a>
### Nested Schema for `owner`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `type` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--source"></a>
### Nested Schema for `source`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `type` (String)
